pr.title: some grgreatbay data matching + attribute labelling
pr.author: MarioLover63

summary: Great Bay stage PR touching only src/melee/gr/grgreatbay.c. It labels grGb_StageAttr fields by observed use, annotates StageCallbacks rows with object roles, defines previously extern data for item spawning/rotation, and makes small matching-oriented local/PAD_STACK adjustments. Bot report says grgreatbay .data, .rodata, and .sdata reached 100% and several functions improved slightly.

key_files.role: Only changed file; Great Bay stage source with StageCallbacks, grGb_StageAttr field names, data definitions, and affected Great Bay functions.

what_changed.text: Added inline comments to grGb_803E3E84 StageCallbacks entries identifying roles such as turtle, main stage, background, foreground water, giants, moon, and tingle.

Renamed grGb_StageAttr offset-style fields x0..x78/x7C to semantic fields for moon wait frames, float floor rates/limits, kame turtle wait/rebirth frames, position offsets, scale, direction probabilities, item probability, and item table entries.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: typedef struct grGb_StageAttr field rename block

what_changed.text: Updated Great Bay code to use the new grGb_StageAttr field names in turtle setup/update, moon setup/update, float floor movement, direction selection, and item spawning logic.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grGreatBay_801F4694, grGreatBay_801F499C, grGreatBay_801F5A00, grGreatBay_801F5AF8, grGreatBay_801F5E28, grGreatBay_801F60C4, grGreatBay_801F62F8, grGreatBay_801F63F4 field use changes

what_changed.text: Renamed a local HSD_JObj pointer in grGreatBay_801F499C from jobj2 to trans_jobj and updated assertions/call sites accordingly.
Changed grGb_803B81C8 and grGb_803B81D4 from extern declarations to const Vec3 and const SpawnItem definitions in grgreatbay.c.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: extern Vec3 grGb_803B81C8 and extern SpawnItem grGb_803B81D4 replaced with const definitions

what_changed.text: Adjusted PAD_STACK usage in grGreatBay_801F60C4 and grGreatBay_801F63F4 and added a padding local in grGreatBay_801F63F4.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: PAD_STACK(12) to PAD_STACK(4), PAD_STACK(8) to PAD_STACK(4), s32 padding added

what_changed.text: Bot report recorded data-section matches for main/melee/gr/grgreatbay and slight score improvements for grGreatBay_801F499C, grGreatBay_801F63F4, and grGreatBay_801F60C4.

smart_moves.text: The PR replaced offset-style stage-attribute fields with names grouped by behavior domain: moon, floatfloor, kame, probabilities, and item table. This makes later code review and decomp work easier without changing the struct layout shown in the diff.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grGb_StageAttr offset comments preserved while field names changed

smart_moves.text: The new field names are propagated through actual use sites, so readers can see why each label was chosen, for example kame_scale used for JObj scale, moon_fall_wait_* used for moon timers, and floatfloor_* used in floating-floor response calculations.

The StageCallbacks comments provide a lightweight map from callback array rows to stage objects, which helps navigate address-style callback functions without renaming the function symbols themselves.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a stage attribute struct is still offset-named, field labels can be recovered from repeated use-site roles while preserving offset comments and exact types.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grGb_StageAttr x0..x78/x7C renamed with unchanged offsets/types
raw_diff: field names used in Great Bay functions

decomp_lessons.lesson: For callback arrays that remain address-function based, adding object-role comments can improve local navigation without asserting new semantic function names.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grGb_803E3E84 comments turtle/main stage/background/foreground water/giants/moon/tingle

decomp_lessons.lesson: Data matching may require moving known Vec3/SpawnItem data from extern declarations into const definitions in the owning translation unit, but this should be backed by section/report evidence.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grGb_803B81C8 and grGb_803B81D4 const definitions added
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report .data/.rodata/.sdata for main/melee/gr/grgreatbay reached 100%

naming_conventions.convention: Use subsystem/object prefixes for recovered stage attribute fields: moon_*, floatfloor_*, and kame_*.
For paired random-range bounds in this PR, suffixes _a and _b were used instead of min/max names.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grGb_StageAttr s16 timer fields and rand_range use sites

naming_conventions.convention: Rename ambiguous locals when a specific role is clear; this PR used trans_jobj for the JObj used for translation/rotation operations.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grGreatBay_801F499C local jobj2 renamed to trans_jobj

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use narrowly scoped PAD_STACK size changes and an explicit padding local to influence stack shape for partially unmatched functions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grGreatBay_801F63F4 added s32 padding and PAD_STACK(8) to PAD_STACK(4)
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report improvements for grGreatBay_801F60C4 and grGreatBay_801F63F4
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The PR evidence has a bot score report but no author explanation or objdiff details for why these exact padding changes were needed.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Define TU-owned const data rather than leaving extern declarations when data-section matching evidence supports ownership.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: const Vec3 grGb_803B81C8 and const SpawnItem grGb_803B81D4 definitions
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The slice does not include symbols.txt, map, or split metadata proving ownership independently of the diff and bot report.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Keep loop structure for item probability selection while replacing offset-style table accesses with named struct array fields.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grGreatBay_801F63F4 loops over items[offset / 4] and items[i]

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: GALE01 report: matched data +0.05% (+632 bytes), with grgreatbay .data, .rodata, and .sdata reaching 100%; grGreatBay_801F499C, grGreatBay_801F63F4, and grGreatBay_801F60C4 had small improvements.

follow_up_queries: Great Bay StageCallbacks turtle moon tingle

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR 2399 merged, one changed file, 115 additions, 97 deletions
notes: Diff evidence is strong for what changed in grgreatbay.c.
There is no human PR body, review comment, or review rationale in the slice.
The bot report supports data-section matching/improvement claims but does not provide objdiff details, build logs, or author intent.

Semantic correctness of labels such as kame and floatfloor is supported by use-site names/operations in the diff, but the slice does not include external asset metadata or source comments proving every label.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use use-site behavior to label stage attribute structs while preserving layout evidence
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2399 shows grGb_StageAttr offset fields renamed into moon, floatfloor, kame, probability, and item-table fields, with unchanged offset comments/types and use sites updated throughout grgreatbay.c.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Great Bay function use-site updates

accepted_candidate_records.title: Treat PAD_STACK/padding changes as narrow matching tactics requiring report evidence
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2399 changes PAD_STACK sizes and adds a padding local in two partially unmatched functions; the only validation in-slice is the bot report showing small improvements for those functions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: PAD_STACK and padding local changes

source_update_candidates.title: src/melee/gr/grgreatbay.c owns Great Bay stage callbacks and grGb_StageAttr labels
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2399 changed only src/melee/gr/grgreatbay.c, adding StageCallbacks row role comments and semantic labels for grGb_StageAttr fields used by Great Bay moon, kame/turtle, floating floor, and item-spawn logic.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: StageCallbacks comments and grGb_StageAttr labels
source_update_candidates.reason: Could help future path/source classification for Great Bay stage data and attribute work; curator should verify against current source before promoting.

source_update_candidates.title: Great Bay grGb_StageAttr field name candidates
source_update_candidates.text: Candidate field names from PR 2399: moon_fall_wait_a/b; floatfloor_landing_rate, slant/slide/down multipliers/adds/limits/rates; kame wait/rebirth frames, x/y positions, offsets, scale, ud scale, direction probabilities, item probability, and items[10].
source_update_candidates.reason: May be useful as data-sheet terminology, but this intake does not verify against current source, asset names, or external data documentation.

source_update_candidates.title: Callback-array role comments as a conservative alternative to speculative function renames
source_update_candidates.text: When callback functions still have address-style names, object-role comments on callback array rows can improve reviewability without renaming symbols before semantics are fully proven.
source_update_candidates.reason: This aligns with conservative naming, but should remain a curator-reviewed standards candidate rather than an accepted global rule from one PR.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that every new grGb_StageAttr field name is globally canonical without checking current source and any stage asset/data documentation.
Do not generalize the exact PAD_STACK sizes or the added padding local as reusable style; the slice lacks objdiff/build rationale beyond a bot score report.
Do not claim human reviewer approval or rationale; the slice has no human review comments and an empty PR body.
